title: Great Wang Dynasty
content:
The 
Wang Family
 are the 
descendants of

Wang Lin
.

Background
[
]

Family
[
]

Founded by 
Wang Lin
 600 Years Ago.

Dynasty
[
]

It was founded 437 years ago and became the most important clan of mortals aside from the 
Forsaken Immortal Clan
.

The Wang Imperial Family had a very long family history. More than 400 years of consolidation had allowed the dynasty to amass a large amount of soldiers, and even countless martial artists had joined them. However, what made the dynasty so powerful was the large amount of cultivators!

In addition to the 
Cloud Sky Sect
, 
Zhou Wutai
 and various other sects acted as their backing. The Wang clan members enjoyed a very high status due to this.
